title: DIMCP EP_18 season2 GlowOfTracy the delivery tarantula
archivePath: CRFW Archive/_Documentation/Videos/2018/Dog is my Copilot/DIMCP EP_18 season2 GlowOfTracy the delivery tarantula.mp4
transcript:
[00:00:00.00] One thing I want to talk about is how every delivery tarantula loves the sunlight.
[00:00:07.00] Tracy, when you're a spider corpse and you're glow in the dark marble crypt,
[00:00:17.00] what really isn't, is a nice sun shiny day.
[00:00:25.00] You know, and if you to charge that glow, you know what I'm saying?
[00:00:30.00] Roof?
[00:00:31.00] We'll call back later.
